description: Composition:Green round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort FitIf you think that you are the King of Cool, then by all means advertise it. This uber cool tee from tantra says justs that on the chest. Team this tee with denims, cargoes or corduroys for outings with friends, trips to the mall and much more.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
